name: batch_grep
description: Search multiple patterns in files with file type filtering, directory exclusion, line exclusion, before/after context, and head limit.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before searching (avoids cd + grep pattern)

parameters.name: --include=GLOB
parameters.description: File name glob filter (repeatable, OR logic)

parameters.name: --exclude-pattern=PAT
parameters.description: Exclude lines matching pattern (repeatable, like grep -v)

parameters.name: --context=N|-C=N
parameters.description: Show N lines of context (before and after)

parameters.name: --before-context=N|-B=N
parameters.description: Show N lines of context before match

parameters.name: --after-context=N|-A=N
parameters.description: Show N lines of context after match

examples.expected: Shows lines matching GetTrail or NetTrail in .go files, with 5 lines before and 10 lines after, excluding test files and vendor

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-pipeline grep patterns (grep | grep -v | head) and separate -A/-B context flags with one call, saving 3+ steps per search.
